ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position the player plays */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "bat_side" TEXT /* The side the player bats from */,
  "throw_side" TEXT /* The side the player throws from */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_teamID" TEXT /* The team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season entry */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., Regular, Postseason) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_teamID" TEXT /* Team that won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the salary corresponds to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player for that season */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* The year the contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* The year the contract ends */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "performance_bonus" REAL /* Performance bonus amount */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Incentives included in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the start of the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed at the start of the game */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the start of the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Number of innings played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Scout, Coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read-Only, Read-Write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
